activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.certificate_value:
Talurit AB
Amalia Jönssons Gata 29
42131, Västra Frölunda
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
Talurit AB
Amalia Jönssons Gata 29
SE-421 31 Västra Frölunda
Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Talurit AB' from Sweden in certificate can be exactly identified in invoice including address normalization (Amalia Jönssons Gata 29, Västra Frölunda, Sweden). Juridical name matches directly and land matches exactly. Rule 4.1.0 (Consignor in invoice documents), 4.1.3.6 (Legal entity abbreviation), and 4.1.4 (Land check) apply.

consignee.certificate_value:
Certspmc Services Limited
Salyan Highway 28/30 km
BAKU AZ 1083
AZERBAJDZJAN
consignee.invoice_value:
Certspmc Services Limited
Salyan Highway 28/30 km
BAKU AZ 1083
AZERBAJDZJAN
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Certspmc Services Limited' with Azerbajdzjan address as specified in certificate is explicitly found in invoice's Delivery Address and Customer Code sections. Name and land are matching after normalization. Normalization for legal entity abbreviation accepted (Limited).

goods_description.motivation: Certificate uses a general goods description accompanied by explicit invoice number '1213536' and date '2025-09-22' which matches invoice header. Rule 4.3.5 allows acceptance of general description when invoice reference is verifiable, hence goods description is considered matched.

quantity.motivation: Quantity of '50,28 kg NET' in certificate is explicitly identified in invoice's 'Net weight 50,28 kg' line. Units match by allowed normalization and weight category NET is consistent in both documents. Invoice explicitly states same numeric value and unit, fulfilling matching criteria.

origin.motivation: Certificate indicates origin as 'EU - SWEDEN'. Invoice indicates 'Origin: SE', which is a recognized ISO code for Sweden, an EU member state. EU normalization rules 4.5.4.1 and 4.5.4.2 apply, confirming origin match without conflict.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All applicable control points match according to explicit text and allowed normalization. No discrepancies or uncertainties detected. Full verification compliant with rules.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla relevanta uppgifter i certifikatet kunde tydligt verifieras mot fakturan. Avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland är i överensstämmelse. Dokumenten kan därför godkännas automatiskt.
